name: Dixie Belle Stuffing[for a 12-pound Turke
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut sausage into thick slices. Brown for 5 minutes on each side in a medium-size frying pan, then break into small chunks. Cook for an additional minute or until no pink remains. Remove with a slotted spoon and combine with stuffing mix in a large bowl.
2. Stir onions and celery into the drippings in the pan; sauté until soft. Stir in water; heat to boiling. Pour over sausage mixture; add parsley. Toss lightly until evenly moist.
